reviews.review_description: The game is just like OG but with some old versions of the wasteland monster and the old project but I have an issue half of people that play this game probably do not know clouds and are just little kids that just say random stuff they are ruining the community the green monster and EMC as I say is from the old project meanwhile the little kids that have no brain cells keep saying that it's toxic Gunner please don't listen and please don't get misinformation off of clouds games thank you very much

Best game I ever played 10/10 would recommend, if you don’t play the boogie man will be under your bed and will eat your bed frame and steal all your money and teeth, also he will lick all your spoons and put them back

So I've been playing for about a day now, I've already seen all the maps and monsters and I think they are all really cool, hyper is really kind to his community and he deserves more players on this game etc.
This game is awsome and the summons are cool i like the geometry Dash one this is the best￼￼

reviews.review_title: This is the best game I've ever seen
reviews.review_description: This really brings back the good old time playing cloud gorilla horror 😊
Low effort, slop, no custom monsters, somehow active players THE GAME SUCKS DON’T BUY IY
This was actually pretty scary and it’s underrated so who ever see this review this game is worth downloading
Game is really fun, very enjoyable
